ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reported case */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the case was reported */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time when the case was reported */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group of the individuals */,
  "confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases in the age group */,
  "deceased_cases" INTEGER /* Number of deceased cases in the age group */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases in the age group */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test used to confirm the case (e.g., PCR, rapid antigen) */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms exhibited by the individuals */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., community, travel-related, close contact) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 0s, 10s, 20s) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "age_range_start" INTEGER /* Start of the age range */,
  "age_range_end" INTEGER /* End of the age range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the entity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., hospital, clinic, laboratory) */,
  " GeoLocation" TEXT /* Geolocation of the entity (latitude and longitude) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health worker, researcher, admin) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the entity the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES reporting_entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case report */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity submitting the report */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reported case */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was submitted */,
  "submission_time" TEXT /* Time when the report was submitted */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reports_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES reporting_entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reports_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case update */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being updated */,
  "previous_confirmed" INTEGER /* Previous number of confirmed cases */,
  "new_confirmed" INTEGER /* New number of confirmed cases */,
  "previous_deceased" INTEGER /* Previous number of deceased cases */,
  "new_deceased" INTEGER /* New number of deceased cases */,
  "previous_recovered" INTEGER /* Previous number of recovered cases */,
  "new_recovered" INTEGER /* New number of recovered cases */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time when the update was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_updates_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Aggregated data and insights in text format */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_address" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the entity */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the entity */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the entity is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the entity is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the entity's location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the entity is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being commented on */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or note about the case */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_time" TEXT /* Time when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_comments_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)
